anavacchinna a.
1 Not bounded or marked off, not separated or cut.
2 Unlimited, immoderate, excessive.
3 Undefined; dikkālādi˚  Bh. 2. 1 ; 3. 1 ; undiscriminated, unmodified.
4 Uninterrupted, continuous.
